title: Oracle Red Bull Racing Adrenaline for SPAR Slovenia
summary: A 12-week national grocery campaign with experiential activations, premium Oracle Red Bull Racing rewards and a Porsche driving lottery.

details.campaignTitle: Fueling Loyalty with Oracle Red Bull Racing Adrenaline
details.challenge: SPAR Slovenia wanted to energize customer engagement and drive store traffic across its national network, increasing spend per visit and building deeper loyalty through aspirational rewards.

rewardGroups.title: Travel & Mobility
rewardGroups.subtitle: Essentials designed for seamless movement and smart packing.

rewardGroups.title: Bags & Everyday Gear
rewardGroups.subtitle: Stylish and functional companions for daily use or short trips.

rewardGroups.title: Food & Drink On-the-Go
rewardGroups.subtitle: For staying refreshed and prepared wherever the journey leads.

activations: In-store gaming activations in selected SPAR locations increased dwell time and campaign visibility.
Interactive branded touchpoints created shareable moments tied to the Oracle Red Bull Racing world.
mechanics: Spend 10 EUR to 19.99 EUR to collect 1 loyalty point.
Spend 20 EUR or more to collect additional points based on basket value.
High-octane lottery: chance to win 1 of 5 Porsche 718 driving experiences at Red Bull Ring, Austria.

title: Pintinox BBQ for MOL Hungary
summary: An 11-week loyalty program across 370 stations built around the Pintinox Master The Grill collection and a digital stamp mechanic in MOL Move.

details.campaignTitle: Master the Grill - Loyalty Campaign for MOL Hungary
details.challenge: MOL Hungary wanted to increase engagement and spending among MOL Move members with a seasonal loyalty concept that blended practical value and premium design.

rewardGroups.title: Grill Like a Pro
rewardGroups.subtitle: Performance-focused tools for serious BBQ sessions.

rewardGroups.title: Cool, Carry & Enjoy
rewardGroups.subtitle: Comfort and portability for outdoor summer moments.

rewardGroups.title: Adventure-Ready Essentials
rewardGroups.subtitle: Rugged tools for camping and outdoor exploration.

mechanics: 1 digital stamp for every HUF 4,000 spent at participating stations.
Stamps credited automatically in MOL Move when loyalty card is scanned.
5 stamps unlock a digital coupon for one Pintinox item at promotional price.
Coupons redeemable in all 370 participating stations.

title: Oracle Red Bull Racing Adrenaline for Kaufland Bulgaria
summary: A 10-week campaign combining collectible Oracle Red Bull Racing rewards, in-store activations and a Porsche 718 Cayman S experience lottery.

details.campaignTitle: Fueling Loyalty with Oracle Red Bull Racing Adrenaline
details.challenge: Kaufland Bulgaria aimed to energize its summer calendar, attract new shoppers and increase repeat visits while delivering standout value to Kaufland Card users.

rewardGroups.title: Travel & Mobility
rewardGroups.subtitle: Essentials designed for seamless movement and smart packing.

rewardGroups.title: Bags & Everyday Gear
rewardGroups.subtitle: Stylish and functional companions for daily use or short trips.

rewardGroups.title: Food & Drink On-the-Go
rewardGroups.subtitle: For staying refreshed and prepared wherever the journey leads.

activations: Pit Stop Challenge at Kaufland XOPark (24-25 May 2025) with real-time tire-change simulation.
F1 Racing Simulator at Kaufland Tsentralni Hali (17-18 May 2025).
F1 Real Show Car display at Sofia Izgrev hypermarket.
mechanics: Shop & Earn: Kaufland Card users collected points and redeemed products with up to 70% discount.
Lottery #1: buy limited 4-pack Red Bull and register receipt to win 1 of 20 VIP Showrun tickets.
Lottery #2: spend over 59.99 BGN on campaign products to enter draw for 1 of 2 Porsche 718 Cayman S trips at Red Bull Ring.

title: Bugatti Primo for Lukoil Bulgaria
summary: Awarded Best Loyalty Campaign 2024 at Lukoil Bulgaria, this 10-week program paired premium Bugatti kitchen rewards with a high-frequency points mechanic.

details.campaignTitle: Awarded as the Best Loyalty Campaign 2024 by Lukoil Bulgaria
details.challenge: Bring premium differentiation to forecourt loyalty by combining daily fuel purchases with aspirational, high-quality kitchen rewards.

rewardGroups.title: A Culinary Masterpiece
rewardGroups.subtitle: Bugatti Primo kitchen essentials blending Italian design and everyday performance.

mechanics: 1 point for every 10 BGN spent on fuel or goods on a single receipt.
Double points with Lukoil Club loyalty card: 2 points for every 10 BGN.
Customers redeemed Bugatti Primo products with discounts up to 75%.

title: Stardust Travel for OMV Hungary
summary: A 12-week NASA-inspired forecourt loyalty campaign with 13 travel products and a lottery to win an Audi Q2.

details.campaignTitle: Stardust Travel for OMV Hungary
details.challenge: Create a space-inspired loyalty journey with strong collectible appeal while increasing fuel and shop spend across OMV's national station network.

rewardGroups.title: Space-Inspired Travel Collection
rewardGroups.subtitle: Licensed bags, accessories and family-oriented items designed to boost participation.

mechanics: 1 sticker for every HUF 4,000 spent.
Double stickers when buying MaxxMotion fuels.
After 10 stickers, customers could purchase Stardust products at discounted prices.
Lottery mechanic: buy at least 1 Stardust product and register receipt for chance to win an Audi Q2.

title: Pintinox Trust Forged In Steel for Petrom Romania
summary: A 14-week sticker-based campaign across 389 stations, offering premium Pintinox kitchen and outdoor essentials with discounts up to 83%.

details.campaignTitle: Pintinox Trust Forged In Steel for Petrom Romania
details.challenge: Drive repeat forecourt visits with a versatile reward collection relevant both to home cooking and outdoor lifestyles.

rewardGroups.title: Kitchen & Outdoor Essentials
rewardGroups.subtitle: Designed for customers who are chefs by choice and adventurers by nature.
items: Knife set 4 pcs (Sharpener, Paring, Chef's, Bread)

mechanics: Spend requirement: 25 LEI for 1 sticker.
Collect 15 stickers to unlock 1 product with up to 83% discount.
Time-limited special offers on selected products for loyal Petrom customers.

title: Police For MOL Hungary
summary: A 9-week loyalty campaign across 400 MOL petrol stations, rewarding customers with an 11-piece POLICE 'Audacity Wanted' collection redeemable through stickers on MOL Move.

details.campaignTitle: Choose Yourself Every Day – POLICE "Audacity Wanted" Loyalty Campaign for MOL Hungary
details.challenge: In collaboration with MOL Hungary, KLR aimed to create a high-impact loyalty promotion that did more than drive repeat purchases—it had to resonate emotionally with modern consumers, deliver real value, and activate the power of MOL's digital loyalty platform, MOL Move.
mechanics: Earn Stickers: for every 4,000 HUF spent on fuel or in-store purchases, customers received 1 sticker.
Get Rewarded: collect 5 stickers to unlock at least 50% off any item in the exclusive POLICE collection.
Boost Benefits: scanning the MOL Move loyalty card enabled deeper discounts and smoother redemption.

title: Pintinox For Viada Latvia
summary: A 15-week loyalty campaign across 93 Viada Latvia petrol stations rewarding customers with a 12-piece Pintinox "Trust Forged in Steel" kitchen and outdoor tools collection.

details.campaignTitle: Pintinox Trust Forged In Steel – Ready for Every Challenge
details.challenge: The "Trust Forged in Steel" loyalty campaign rewarded Viada Latvia customers with access to high-quality Pintinox kitchen and outdoor tools at discounted prices, aiming to enhance customer engagement, increase sales, and reinforce Viada's commitment to offering premium products to its clientele.

rewardGroups.title: Kitchen Knife Sets
items: 4-piece set: Sharpener, Paring, Chef's, and Bread Knife
3-piece set: Cleaver, Slicing, and Tomato Knife
3-piece set: Santoku, Utility Knife, and Scissors

mechanics: Customers earned 1 promotional sticker for every €5 spent at Viada Latvia petrol stations.
Stickers were collected in a promotional booklet, available at the petrol station goods stand or cash desks.

Once the required number of stickers was collected, customers could redeem them for Pintinox products at a discounted price. Up to 50% of the payment could also be covered using VIADA PLUS discount card accumulated money.

title: Zanussi Zmart Move for Carrefour Poland
summary: A 16-week loyalty campaign across 216 Carrefour Poland supermarkets offering a 16-piece Zanussi "Zmart Move" cookware and accessories collection under the claim 'Cook Smarter, Eat More Deliciously'.

details.campaignTitle: ZANUSSI Zmart Move Loyalty Campaign for Carrefour – Poland
details.challenge: Under the claim "Cook Smarter, Eat More Deliciously", the Zmart Move campaign was built around the idea that cooking should be effortless, enjoyable, and accessible to all — giving Carrefour customers the opportunity to upgrade their kitchen with durable, high-performance Zanussi products without breaking the bank.

rewardGroups.title: Cutlery & Accessories
items: Knives Set (Cleaver, Slicing Knife, Utility Knife)

mechanics: Spend requirement: 20 zł for 1 sticker.
5 stickers to get 1 product with up to 50% discount.

title: Space Collection for Petrol – Slovenia, Croatia, Bosnia Herzegovina
summary: A 16-week Space-themed loyalty campaign across 550 Petrol stations in Slovenia, Croatia and Bosnia Herzegovina, offering a 13-piece collection of bags, trolleys and accessories with discounts up to 75%.

details.campaignTitle: An Exclusive Collection for Space Lovers
details.challenge: The Space Collection loyalty campaign aimed to encourage customers to visit Petrol station stores and reward their loyalty with highly functional and visually appealing space-themed products, letting them proudly display their affiliation with Petrol.

rewardGroups.title: The Collection
rewardGroups.subtitle: 13 products inspired by space exploration

mechanics: By refueling at PETROL gas stations, customers could collect stickers — 10 of them could be exchanged for Stardust products at up to 75% discount.
Petrol Klub members needed fewer stickers to collect the products.
Stickers were collectable both with the Petrol GO app and/or with a collection card.

title: Eurosport Champions For Viada Latvia & Lithuania
summary: A 15-week Olympic-themed loyalty campaign across 210 Viada petrol stations in Latvia and Lithuania, offering a 14-piece Eurosport Champions sports collection with discounts up to 75% and a Paris 2024 Olympics trip lottery.

details.campaignTitle: EUROSPORT Champions – Sports for Everyone!
details.challenge: Inspired by the Olympic Games Paris 2024, the Eurosport Champions collection celebrated those with a winning mindset, both on and off the field, letting Viada's customers around Latvia and Lithuania gear up like true champions with premium sports gear at exceptional prices.

rewardGroups.title: The Collection
rewardGroups.subtitle: 14 products for real everyday Champions

mechanics: Spend requirement: 7 EUR for 1 sticker.
5 stickers to get 1 product with up to 75% discount.
Special time-limited offers on selected Eurosport products for the most loyal VIADA customers.
Lottery: a trip for two people from each country to the Olympic Games in Paris to attend the Bronze medal basketball match, with flights and accommodation provided.

title: Bugatti Spezia for Maxima Latvia
summary: A 14-week loyalty campaign across 170 Maxima supermarkets offering a sophisticated 12-piece Bugatti Spezia cookware collection with discounts of up to 70%.

details.campaignTitle: Bugatti Spezia Loyalty Campaign for Maxima Latvia
details.challenge: The Bugatti Spezia elegant cookware collection, featuring sleek, modern design and soft-touch handles, enabled Maxima supermarkets to launch an engaging 14-week loyalty campaign that boosted customer engagement and increased purchases through the collection of stickers.

rewardGroups.title: The Collection
rewardGroups.subtitle: 12 products for sophisticated cooking enthusiasts

mechanics: Spend requirement: 10€ for 1 sticker.
5 stickers to get 1 product with up to 70% discount.
Special time-limited offers on selected products for most-loyal MAXIMA customers.

title: Zanussi SuperGrip for IKI Lithuania
summary: A 12-week loyalty campaign across 216 IKI supermarkets offering a 10-piece Zanussi SuperGrip knife collection at up to 60% discount for a minimum in-store spend.

details.campaignTitle: ZANUSSI SUPERGRIP Loyalty Campaign for IKI – Lithuania
details.challenge: As the essential complement to Zanussi kitchen appliances, the SuperGrip Collection let IKI's customers upgrade their kitchen arsenal without compromising on quality or breaking the bank, delivering premium performance at an accessible price.

rewardGroups.title: The Collection
rewardGroups.subtitle: 10 products blending durability and comfort

mechanics: Customers had to shop in stores for at least 15€ to get a 60% discount on Zanussi products.

title: Bugatti Buono Cookware for BILLA – Bulgaria
summary: An 11-week baking-themed loyalty campaign across 140 BILLA supermarkets offering a 14-piece Bugatti Buono! cookware collection, a recipe book and a weekly Bugatti appliance lottery for cardholders.

results.v: Lottery for BILLA loyalty card holders

details.campaignTitle: Bugatti Buono! Loyalty Campaign for BILLA – Bulgaria
details.challenge: Bugatti Buono!'s baking cookware collection let BILLA supermarkets launch a captivating loyalty campaign that boosted customer engagement, increased the penetration of purchases with the BILLA loyalty card, and enhanced the supermarket's brand image.
mechanics: Promotional stickers were obtained when making a purchase in BILLA stores with a minimum value of BGN 10 with a Billa Card — 1 sticker per BGN 10 spent.
10 stickers could be exchanged for Bugatti Buono! products with a discount of up to 72%.
A QR code inside product packaging unlocked exclusive recipes on a dedicated website.

Weekly lottery: customers who purchased Bugatti Buono! products with their BILLA Card could register the receipt for a chance to win a Bugatti Blender, with a final raffle for a Bugatti coffee machine.

title: Stardust Travel for SLOVNAFT – Slovakia
summary: A 12-week Space-themed loyalty campaign across 234 Slovnaft petrol stations offering a 10-piece Stardust travel collection, driving a 9% increase in basket size and a Kennedy Space Center trip lottery.

results.v: Share of purchases with Slovnaft Move members

details.campaignTitle: An Exclusive Collection for Space Lovers and an Opportunity to Win a Trip to the Kennedy Space Center
details.challenge: The STARDUST loyalty campaign gave Slovnaft Slovakia customers a unique opportunity to acquire a collection of exclusive bags, trolleys and accessories inspired by space exploration, with double-price mechanics designed to boost Slovnaft MOVE loyalty membership.

rewardGroups.title: The Collection
rewardGroups.subtitle: 10 products inspired by space exploration
items: A food container and a water bottle

mechanics: By refueling at Slovnaft Slovakia petrol stations, customers could collect stickers — 10 of them could be exchanged for Stardust products at discounts of at least 50%.
Slovnaft Move members could purchase loyalty products at an even better price (at least 60%) after presenting and scanning their card.
Lottery: after purchasing any product from the STARDUST collection, customers could register their receipt for a chance to win a family trip to the Kennedy Space Center in Florida, worth €10,000.

title: NEWME Food For Longer for Tropic and Crvena Jabuka – Bosnia and Herzegovina
summary: A 16-week sustainability-focused loyalty campaign across 41 Tropic and Crvena Jabuka supermarkets offering a 14-piece NEWME "Food For Longer" collection, with reduced sticker requirements for Klub Osmijeha members.

details.campaignTitle: NEWME Food For Longer for Tropic and Crvena Jabuka – Bosnia and Herzegovina
details.challenge: NEWME Food for Longer is a collection tailor-made for customers who want products that comply with a sustainable lifestyle — helping them plan and prepare meals, store food correctly to reduce waste, and enjoy home-made meals on the go.

rewardGroups.title: The Collection
rewardGroups.subtitle: 14 sustainable products — glass, recyclable materials, 30% wheat-straw fibre plastic, 100% reusable

mechanics: 1 sticker for each 10 KM spent.
With 10 stickers, products come with up to 70% discount.
For "Klub Osmijeha" members, only 7 stickers were needed.

title: Alfa Romeo Gran Turismo for Rompetrol– Romania
summary: An 11-week Christmas loyalty campaign across 245 Rompetrol petrol stations offering a 12-piece Alfa Romeo Gran Turismo gift collection at up to 68% discount, with an Alfa Romeo Tonale Hybrid as the lottery main prize.

details.campaignTitle: Alfa Romeo Gran Turismo for Rompetrol – Romania
details.challenge: The stylish Alfa Romeo Gran Turismo Gifts campaign ran during the Christmas period, offering Rompetrol customers a collection of exclusive bags, small leather accessories and multitools designed with Alfa Romeo's passion for automotive, packaged in exclusive gift boxes.

rewardGroups.title: The Collection
rewardGroups.subtitle: 12 items
items: Women's Wallet in a gift box
Men's Wallet in a gift box

mechanics: Top up or purchase for a minimum of 50 lei from any Rompetrol station to receive 1 bonus sticker point.
10 sticker points allowed purchase of limited edition Alfa Romeo products with a 68% discount.

Lottery: chance to win an Alfa Romeo Tonale Hybrid car as the main prize and 8 Rompetrol Fuel Cards (one year value) as weekly prizes for purchases of at least 150 lei. Rompetrol Go members had double chances to win.

title: Alfa Romeo Gran Turismo for OMV – Slovenia
summary: A 13-week loyalty campaign across 100+ OMV gas stations in Slovenia offering a 12-piece Alfa Romeo Gran Turismo bag and accessories collection, with an Alfa Romeo Tonale Hybrid as the lottery grand prize.

results.v: Mechanics for OMV Smile&Drive Club members

details.campaignTitle: Alfa Romeo Gran Turismo for OMV – Slovenia
details.challenge: The stylish Alfa Romeo Gran Turismo campaign offered OMV Slovenia customers a collection of exclusive bags and accessories designed with Alfa Romeo's passion for automotive.

rewardGroups.title: The Collection
rewardGroups.subtitle: 12 items
items: 6 bags for different occasions: backpacks, a lady bag, a travel bag, a shoulder bag

mechanics: Customers collected points for each 10€ spent to get limited edition Alfa Romeo products.
OMV SMILE & DRIVE Club members had a more convenient bonus system, earning golden stickers for MaxxMotion 100plus and MaxxMotion Diesel purchases for even better prices.
Lottery: chance to win an Alfa Romeo Tonale Hybrid car and 30 OMV €100 Value Cards for fuel.

title: Blaupunkt Hi-Fidelity for Mego – Latvia
summary: A 14-week loyalty campaign across 90 Mego supermarkets offering a 14-piece Blaupunkt Hi-Fidelity cookware collection with up to 60% discount for points earned on in-store spend.

details.campaignTitle: Blaupunkt Hi-Fidelity for Mego – Latvia
details.challenge: This loyalty campaign, featuring the Blaupunkt Hi-Fidelity cookware collection, invited Mego customers to add a tone of high-quality cooking to their kitchens, earning points for every 7€ spent in-store.
mechanics: Customers earned points for each 7€ spent in MEGO supermarkets.
With every 5 or 10 points collected, customers could purchase a wide range of products with a 60% discount.
An extra sticker was given for each purchased item of the partner brand, regardless of the total purchase amount.

title: Spear&Jackson Sense of Adventure for Maxima – Estonia
summary: A 13-week outdoor-themed loyalty campaign across 80 Maxima supermarkets offering the Spear&Jackson "Sense of Adventure" trekking collection at a 60% discount, with 16 lottery prizes including a GoPro, an iPhone and an Apple Watch.

details.campaignTitle: Spear&Jackson Sense of Adventure for Maxima – Estonia
details.challenge: Trekking and hiking are very popular in Estonia, so this summer loyalty campaign for Maxima customers focused on outdoor activities, offering basic and essential gear for the whole family through the Spear&Jackson limited edition Sense of Adventure collection.
mechanics: Customers earned points for each 15€ spent in MAXIMA supermarkets.
5 points collected allowed customers to purchase Spear&Jackson products with a 60% discount.
Lottery: 16 exclusive prizes including 1 GoPro H10, 1 iPhone 12, 1 Apple Watch 7 (GPS, 45mm) and 13 Spear&Jackson 19L trekking backpacks.

title: Bugatti Prestigio for Viada – Latvia
summary: A 15-week loyalty campaign across 90 Viada petrol stations offering a 12-piece Bugatti Prestigio collection of Damascus knives, cast iron and baking ceramics at up to 60% discount.

details.campaignTitle: Bugatti Prestigio for Viada – Latvia
details.challenge: This loyalty campaign, featuring Bugatti limited edition Damascus knives, cast iron and baking ceramics, gave VIADA customers the opportunity to earn points for each 10€ spent in petrol stations and redeem them for premium kitchen products.
mechanics: Customers earned points for each 10€ spent in VIADA petrol stations.
5 or 10 points collected allowed VIADA customers to purchase Bugatti products with a 60% discount.
